negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for chili_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u16,axiom,
    baked_by_melissa != dried_thai_chilies).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define spicy(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mala_hotpot(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define baked_sweet(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define cupcake(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define product_from(X0,X1) := $false
